zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Engaine於1270年出生在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內時，他的父親John Engaine41歲，母親Joan Greinville34歲。他和Agnes Fauconberg至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1322年12月10日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Engaine于1270年出生在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內时，他的父亲John Engaine41岁，母亲Joan Greinville34岁。他和Agnes Fauconberg至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1322年12月10日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Engaine was born in 1270, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, his father, John Engaine, was 41 and his mother, Joan Greinville, was 34. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes Fauconberg. He died on 10 December 1322, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas d’Engaine est né en 1270, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Engaine, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Greinville, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes Fauconberg. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1322, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Engaine 1270 in Earls Colne, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Engaine 41 und seine Mutter Joan Greinville 34. Er hatte mit Agnes Fauconberg mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1322 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Engaine è nato il nel 1270 nel Earls Colne, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Engaine, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joan Greinville, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes Fauconberg. Morì il 10 dicembre 1322, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Engaineが1270年にイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで生まれた時，父John Engaineは41歳，母Joan Greinvilleは34歳であった。彼はAgnes Fauconbergとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1322年12月10日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Engaine(이)가 1270년 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Engaine(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Greinville(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Agnes Fauconberg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 12월 10일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Engaine nasceu em 1270, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Engaine, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Greinville, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes Fauconberg. Ele faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1322, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Engaine родился в 1270 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Engaine было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Greinville, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes Fauconberg. Он умер 10 декабря 1322 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Engaine nació en 1270, en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Engaine, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Greinville, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes Fauconberg. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1322, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
